heading: Impact aid for children with severe disabilities

children.heading: Payments
children.label: a Payments
children.text: Subject to subsection (f), the Secretary of Defense shall make a payment for fiscal years after fiscal year 2001, to each local educational agency eligible to receive a payment for a child described in subparagraph (A)(ii) or (B), or clause (i) or (ii) of subparagraph (D), of section 7703(a)(1) of this title that serves two or more such children with severe disabilities, for costs incurred in providing a free appropriate public education to each such child.1See References in Text note below.1
the payment made on behalf of the child with a severe disability that is in excess of the average per pupil expenditure in the State in which the local educational agency is located; less

children.label: A
children.text: from the State in which the child resides to defray the educational and related services for such child;

children.label: B
children.text: under the Individuals with Disabilities Education Act ( et seq.) to defray the educational and related services for such child; and20 U.S.C. 1400

children.label: C
children.text: from any other source to defray the costs of providing educational and related services to the child which are received due to the presence of a severe disabling condition of such child.

five times the national or State average per pupil expenditure (whichever is lower), for a child who is provided educational and related services under a program that is located outside the boundaries of the school district of the local educational agency that pays for the free appropriate public education of the student; or

three times the State average per pupil expenditure, for a child who is provided educational and related services under a program offered by the local educational agency, or within the boundaries of the school district served by the local educational agency.

children.heading: Ratable reduction
children.label: d Ratable reduction
children.text: If the amount available for a fiscal year for payments under subsection (a) is insufficient to pay the full amount all local educational agencies are eligible to receive under such subsection, the Secretary of Defense shall ratably reduce the amounts of the payments made under such subsection to all local educational agencies by an equal percentage.
the number of severely disabled children for which a payment may be made under this section; and
a breakdown of the average cost, by placement (inside or outside the boundaries of the school district of the local educational agency), of providing education and related services to such children.

children.heading: Payments subject to appropriation
children.label: f Payments subject to appropriation
children.text: Payments shall be made for any period in a fiscal year under this section only to the extent that funds are appropriated specifically for making such payments for that fiscal year.

children.heading: Local educational agency defined
children.label: g Local educational agency defined
children.text: In this section, the term “local educational agency” has the meaning given that term in .section 7713 of this title
